name: BB:FalsePositive: Reversed Flows
notes: At times flows within the system will get reversed (source IP is listed as the destination). This BB will stop these flows from being processed by the rules.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: Reversed Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the source bytes is equal to 0
when the destination bytes is greater than 0
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: Reversed Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source bytes is equal to 0
AND when the destination bytes is greater than 0
